strengths: 20+ years of hands-on engineering experience across backend, embedded, mobile, and web systems demonstrates the broad technical foundation expected at this level
Active AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at current role shows genuine builder engagement with the AI tooling space

Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective (open-source, self-funded, production users), conference talks, and multi-day workshop facilitation shows knowledge-sharing instincts aligned with the role's external influence responsibilities
concerns: AI expertise is nascent (post-April 2025) and narrowly tooling-focused — the role requires recognized, multi-year authorship of AI products or platforms with demonstrated strategic impact
Zero evidence of strategic advisory, executive-level influencing, or customer-facing thought leadership — the defining activities of a director-level AI strategy IC
Overlapping dates between claimed MIT CS enrollment (2009–2012) and documented concurrent employment in Romania create a credential inconsistency worth verifying before investing further

key_factors.factor: Advisory and thought leadership track record

response.justification: Bogdan is a competent senior engineer with real range across stacks and some early AI tooling work, but this is a director-level AI strategy role whose core requirements — recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI product authorship, and strategic advisory to executive customers — are not met. His AI engagement is less than two months old by resume date, his career shows no trajectory toward customer-facing strategy, and there is no evidence of the external influence or thought leadership the role is built around. The engineering foundation is there, but the strategic and AI-specific layers that define this role are absent.
